queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating determinants associated with having no known savings account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of lacking a checking account to credit risk drivers and determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-reducing impact of maintaining savings below 100 DM on credit default probability.
